payload.answer: Access Denied: You do not have sufficient administrative privileges to execute SQL DELETE commands directly on memory_cards. Please contact an administrator if you believe this is an error or if you require this action.
payload.decision: Deny: Normal user attempting admin-level SQL operation.
payload.intent: Attempt to delete all memory cards via admin SQL command.

details: Operation denied due to insufficient permissions.
User 'Normal user' lacks 'admin' role for SQL execution.

repair_options: Use a non-admin command if available for memory management (e.g., /brain forget <card_id>).
